parameters.query: SELECT period_type, period_label, pipeline_total, weighted_pipeline, won_to_date, lost_to_date, deal_count, avg_deal_size, conversion_rate, forecast_date FROM pipeline_forecast WHERE forecast_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY forecast_date DESC LIMIT 13;

meta.description: GET /webhook/forecast — returns last 13 weeks of pipeline forecast data for Glance.
